control_card.C: Python emitter writes matrix rows to JSON, CSV, Markdown, and manifest.
control_card.F: Full Clay requires a mechanism-exhaustion theorem absent from this route.
control_card.G: Any row marked out_of_scope must keep Clay/general NS flags false.
control_card.L: covered assumption -> covered conclusion -> documentary packet -> explicit non-claim.
control_card.P: Use the matrix to prevent theorem-scope drift during publication.
control_card.R: Separate covered assumptions, conclusions, documentary scope, and explicit non-claims.
control_card.S: The symmetric theorem is closed; general NS and Clay remain not covered.
